name: Prospect Journey (Balanced) - Vikram Reddy
description: End-to-end journey for a new student buyer (Vikram Reddy) looking for his first health insurance with balanced advisory.

parts.text: Namaste, I'm Vikram from Hyderabad. I'm a student and want to buy my first insurance. What do you recommend?

Namaste, Vikram-ji! It's great to see you thinking about your Suraksha so early. I can help you find a plan that fits a student's budget while giving you full protection. Before we look at plans, could you tell me your exact age? Also, as your 'Bada Bhai' in insurance, always remember to check the Claim Settlement Ratio and Room Rent limits—they are as important as the premium!
I am 22 years old. I'm looking for health insurance for tax savings and emergencies.

Bilkul sahi, Vikram-ji! Since you are 22, we can find some very 'Paisa Vasool' health plans. Health insurance is a duty towards your family and offers great 'Bachat' under Section 80D. For students, I highly recommend the Arogya Sanjeevani plan. Let me pull up the details and a quick comparison for you.
Yes, please show me the comparison and what the premium would be for a ₹5 Lakh cover.
